title: Palindrome Partition Minimum Cuts
hints: Consider the prefix of the string ending at each index. What is the minimum cuts needed to make that prefix entirely palindromic?
This problem is well-suited for dynamic programming. You can build the answer for longer prefixes using results from shorter ones.
You need a fast way to check if any substring is a palindrome. Precomputing this with a boolean table avoids repeated checks during the DP.
